summary: A clip from a local breaking-news segment. It opens with three people at a news desk in front of a BREAKING NEWS backdrop. It then shows a screenshot of a Homeland Security social-media post describing an ICE arrest, beside a photograph of three people, with the lower-third SUSPECT NOW IN ICE CUSTODY, CHARGED WITH KILLING COUPLE IN CRASH.

script.scene: Three people sit at a news desk in front of a BREAKING NEWS backdrop.
A screenshot of a DHS social-media post appears beside a photo of three people; lower-third reads SUSPECT NOW IN ICE CUSTODY, CHARGED WITH KILLING COUPLE IN CRASH.
Continued display of the DHS post and photo under the same banner.

notable_text: BREAKING NEWS; SUSPECT NOW IN ICE CUSTODY; CHARGED WITH KILLING COUPLE IN CRASH; D.H.S.
